panels.panel_visual_description: A man and a woman sit side-by-side at a white table in a warmly lit living room. The man is on the right, the woman on the left. They look down towards the center of the table, appearing focused. The man speaks, then the woman speaks.

scenes.visual_description: The scene shows a man and a woman sitting at a table, with a large app interface overlaid in the center. Text labels point to the woman and man. The app UI displays pronunciation exercises and scores.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: Weather.
App voice says: Let's pause to troubleshoot. Listen to the difference in our recordings and try again.
Character B says: Weather.
App voice says: Next, try saying the phrase below.
Character A says: He put on his father's old clothes.
Character A says: Yeah, same. TH, TH.
Character B says: He put on his father's old clothes.
Character A says: Healthy.
App voice says: Let's compare my recording to yours. Do you hear a difference?
Character B says: Healthy.
App voice says: Awesome! Got it this time!
